properties.description: AUTHOR opens the meeting catalog page.
System loads Meetings owned by the current AUTHOR, sorted by updated_at descending.
System renders one row per Meeting with title (or filename fallback), status badge, language, uploaded_at, and duration_sec from Recording.
For rows in transient states (UPLOADING, TRANSCRIBING, PROTOCOL_GENERATING), System auto-refreshes the row status periodically.
AUTHOR navigates to a specific meeting (from catalog or direct link).
System loads Meeting + Recording + most recent TranscriptionJob + most recent ProtocolGenerationJob + existence flags for Transcript and Protocol.
System renders the detail panel: title, language, status badge, recording metadata, and current job error_reason when Meeting.status=FAILED.

System renders conditional action links: View transcript (status >= TRANSCRIPT_READY), Review/Edit protocol (status >= PROTOCOL_READY), Export PDF (status in {PROTOCOL_READY, EDITED}), Delete meeting (always).
AUTHOR clicks Delete on the meeting detail page (UC-002).
System shows confirmation dialog showing the meeting title. If any job is IN_PROGRESS, the dialog warns that the in-flight job will be marked FAILED.
